name: O-11 bootstrap eval scenarios: install time --run-bootstrap-evals runs at least one scenario from seed/fp-examples per §13 O-11
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals --emit-report "$PWD/report.json" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -s report.json ] && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("report.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.scenarios_run>=1?0:1)' && echo scenarios_ran 1>&2
